new_value: {"acceptance_criteria":"Implement hash-based and announce-driven rendezvous per spec 2a.3 in lichen-rpl for peer channel state and gateway integration. Match test vectors. Run 3 codereview passes after every code chunk, file all findings (even P4) as beads with codereview label. Only close bead after 3 clean passes with no new findings. End with bd ready --limit 5, cargo test --package lichen-rpl, cargo clippy --package lichen-rpl --all-features -- -D warnings, same for lichen-gateway. Update only those crates.","design":"Add Rendezvous struct in lichen-rpl/src/rendezvous.rs with compute_channel(sfn, peer_eui, chseed), peer_announce_rx_channel cache. Integrate in routing and gateway tun/slip for channel selection. Follow no_std, heapless where possible. Mirror Python sim logic exactly. Use FNV-1a hash_32 from spec.","notes":"Follow workflow-rule-every-small-code-generation-or-fix strictly. Use subagents for parallel review passes."}
